_comment: SYNTHETIC regression fixture (OB-83) — NOT a real COROS export. Reproduces the SHAPE of COROS's field-size spec violation (python-fitparse#116): a tolerant decoder faced with a field whose declared size isn't a multiple of its base-type size hands scalar fields back wrapped in single-element (sometimes pad-suffixed) arrays, and occasionally as a { value } object. mapFit must normalize these to plain scalars. Real COROS Pace 2 file verification is still outstanding.
